posts.raw_content:
I feel like this is something that doesnt get talked about enough - Im not trying to be a peta "everyone should be vegan" type, but for example I just read a story of a guy who ran over, starved and tortured a wolf just to show it off in bars before killing it and throwing it in a dumpster and then got off with pretty much no punishment. 

A local story near me covered some guys stealing peoples small dogs near by to feed them to their pitbull they used for dog fighting. One night someone caught them in the act, but police refused to even investigate the people responsible. These sort of things dont even scratch the surface of the horrors of dog fighting.

To me, i feel the same way about people abusing animals as other people do when they hear about kids being hurt, for the same reason - they dont know right from wrong in most situations, never do anything to deserve the cruelty done to them, and cant even understand or comprehend why these terrible things are happening to them.

Im not asking people to watch the insane gore clips of psychotic slaughterhouse workers terrorizing and throwing around scared and dying bloody farm animals, but there definitely needs to be a conversation about better protections for animals and punishment for abusers.

To me, anyone with even slightly higher than above average IQ knows we're only animals too. It was luck of the draw we were born humans instead of a simple spider, and its hard to imagine anyone ever being ok if those shock videos were of humans.

I know this will get downvoted and most people will flame me for even posting it here, but I just want it to be a plea that anyone with any power to do anything anout it, sees this, and does it.

A local story near me covered some guys stealing peoples small dogs near by to feed them to their pitbull they used for dog fighting. One night someone caught them in the act, but police refused to even investigate the people responsible. These sort of things dont even scratch the surface of the horrors of dog fighting.

To me, i feel the same way about people abusing animals as other people do when they hear about kids being hurt, for the same reason - they dont know right from wrong in most situations, never do anything to deserve the cruelty done to them, and cant even understand or comprehend why these terrible things are happening to them.

Im not asking people to watch the insane gore clips of psychotic slaughterhouse workers terrorizing and throwing around scared and dying bloody farm animals, but there definitely needs to be a conversation about better protections for animals and punishment for abusers.

To me, anyone with even slightly higher than above average IQ knows we're only animals too. It was luck of the draw we were born humans instead of a simple spider, and its hard to imagine anyone ever being ok if those shock videos were of humans.

I know this will get downvoted and most people will flame me for even posting it here, but I just want it to be a plea that anyone with any power to do anything anout it, sees this, and does it.
